title: Invitation
description: A unique outbound to a stakeholder containing a correlation token. One per stakeholder per assessment. The correlation_token is the load-bearing identifier for B011 (per-invitation token correlation).

correlation_token.description: Cryptographically random per-invitation token; embedded in reply_to_address (R021, B011).

reply_to_address.description: Reply-To address embedding the correlation_token (e.g. reply+<token>@abra...).

body_hash.description: Stable hash of the rendered invitation body for audit (B085).

audit_event_id.description: Reference to the S_audit_event recorded when the invitation was sent.
